title: Bonemeal Sugarcane
description: Very simple lightweight plugin that allows you to bonemeal sugarcane. It works with dispensers too!
body:
Very simple lightweight plugin to bonemeal sugarcane. This works great and now for me it's a must for my minecraft server. Support this project and give a heart :) Unlike other plugins this one can bonemeal sugarcane with dispensers for farms.

If there are bugs please report them in the discord:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/xf5syuBUvj)
